name: section_subheading
label: Section Subheading
default: These features are live in production today. Not a roadmap — a product.

children.name: icon_color
children.label: Icon Color (hex or Tailwind class color)

default.title: Connector Marketplace
default.description: 318 connectors, searchable with logos. One-click activation.

default.title: Visual Workflow Canvas
default.description: Drag-and-drop automation with 22 node types. Like Make.com, but for your stack.

default.title: AI Workflow Builder
default.description: Describe what you want in natural language. AI generates the workflow.

default.title: Self-Service Build
default.description: Operators build their own connectors from the UI. No engineering tickets.

default.title: Per-Connector Nodes
default.description: Each connected tool appears as its own node in the workflow palette.

default.title: Subscription Tiers
default.description: Starter, Core, Pro, Teams, Enterprise. Scale as you grow.

default.title: Connection Defaults
default.description: Set default headers and params once. Applied to every API call automatically.

default.title: Execution History
default.description: Full request/response capture for every execution. Debug anything.
